concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' is too coarse - should reference specific files/directories from plan.md (e.g., 'Create code/, data/, docs/, tests/ directories with substructure per plan.md Project Structure')
T018 'Validate dataset completeness against OEIS A002863' does not name the artifact for validation results. Should specify 'document validation results in docs/reproducibility/validation_scope.md'
T024 'Validate algorithm implementation against KnotInfo' does not name the deliverable. Should specify 'document results in docs/reproducibility/algorithm_validation.md'

T038 'Create combined complexity metric visualization' implements functionality not in spec.md FR-004 (which only requires scatter plots). This is scope creep - either add FR for combined metric or remove task
T039 'Document interpretation of combined metric' follows T038 scope creep. Remove or add corresponding spec requirement
T057 'ensure all 11+ files present' is too coarse - should enumerate exact files (data_quality_report.md, validation_scope.md, excluded_knots.md, etc.)
T058 'Code cleanup and refactoring' has no concrete deliverable or verification criteria. Should specify 'refactor code/ to meet linting standards (black/flake8 pass)'
T059 'Run quickstart.md validation' does not name where results are documented. Should specify 'document validation results in docs/reproducibility/quickstart_validation.md'
T061 'Verify all random seeds are pinned' does not name verification output. Should specify 'document verification in docs/reproducibility/seed_verification.md'

T062-T064 use vague 'final reports' instead of specific file paths. Should specify exact doc files (e.g., docs/reproducibility/selection_bias.md, docs/reproducibility/statistical_interpretation.md, docs/reproducibility/mathematical_constraints.md)
